mappings.rationaleAI: Disease and death are fundamental hazards and endpoints of life.
Death is the ultimate hazard of life in the biosphere, representing the irreversible cessation of biological function.
Disease is a primary hazard of life in the biosphere, affecting populations of all organisms.
The Black Death pandemic is one of the most catastrophic disease events in the history of life in the biosphere.
Cancer is a significant hazard of life causing death.
Infection is a primary hazard of life in the biosphere.
Influenza pandemics represent significant hazards of life.
Malaria is a significant hazard of life especially in tropical regions.
HIV/AIDS is a devastating hazard of life in the biosphere.
Smallpox was a major hazard of life until its eradication.
Ageing leads to death as a hazard of life in the biosphere.
Suicide is a cause of death representing a hazard of life addressed in this section.
Pathogenic bacteria are major agents of disease as a hazard of life in the biosphere.
Viruses are major agents of disease as a hazard of life in the biosphere.
The immune system defends against disease as a hazard of life in the biosphere.
